text.fullText: Freight Brokers should be fazed out period. They got to the point where they have weaponized the entire process against the carriers. They are major disruption to the process with very little regulations while carriers are over-regulated! They are holding the entire industry hostage and they are in bed with major players with in the industry including FMCSA. They all should be investigated. If allowed to stay and operate than broker should not take more than 3% of the load!!! It is unreasonable to dictate the price of load with simple subscription, computer and phone while carriers invest hundreds of thousands of dollars in equipment and their life. If this law is passed than it should include very concise statute stating that broker should provide and disclose full information of the full cost of the load RIGHT AWAY on the rate confirmation. Further more it should include very concise statute stating that the brokers  CAN NOT black list, refuse to work or retaliate if asked to provide full info on cost of the load. Further more FMCSA should stop allowing brokers to weaponize wed site called "Carrier411" where with a simple retaliatory comment they can put carrier out of business and destroy their life. This web site became weapon and blackmail for the trucking industry providing information often inaccurate, incomplete and unfair while disseminating information directly used from FMCSA.
